summary: Base W6 COMPLETE — ~17 mpw, polarized ~85% Z1, on the §2.A revised schedule (Hyp A Tue→Wed, midweek easy Wed→Thu). All 6 training days logged. Sat double executed Achilles-modified (Adj #34): long run trimmed to 40 min flat Z1 @ 10:45/mi in the Vomero (not Zoom Fly 6), nasal throughout, HR 162, and NO Achilles pain on the run — the load-management dose held in-session. Hyp B was a mixed double-day: lat pulldown the clean win (145 + full 4 sets restored → bump 150, Adj #35), but accumulated long-run fatigue ran the isolations to failure — chest-supp row 85 bump failed and regressed to 80-failure (Adj #36), cable lateral permanently capped at 17.5/side per the athlete's directive (Adj #37), tri pushdown 55 reps held but all-failure (Adj #38), preacher 55 hold persists (Adj #39); seated calf held 325 with the 335 bump deferred (Adj #40), soleus skipped (Adj #42), hanging SLR progressed to 12 (Adj #41). LIVE FLAG → Sun AM Achilles recheck (Adj #43): 24-h pain rule decides the W7 call — no-worse = dose held / continue load-managed, worse = step down. Holds (calf 335, soleus progression) persist until a clean AM. Hill strides eligible W7 Mon (SI gate met) but mileage held while Achilles reactive (§11.D). Accutane tendon risk persists (§11.E). Run-MHR retest still owed (Adj #9).

days.note: Logged — 4×20s flat strides, cadence 180/178/196/180 spm; reps 1/2/4 held ≤180 (rep 4 textbook 180@6:00/mi), rep 3 overshot to 196 like Fri 5/22. Adj #24 mostly addressed → Adj #25. Hill strides online W7. No lift.

days.session: Threshold 5×5 min @ T (1 min rec) — run only
days.note: Logged — 5×5 @ 8:00/mi, cadence 180, HR 167/177/179/180/183 (peak 183 = lowest T-peak in log) at RPE 7 (RIR 2). Adj #16 SATISFIED → 8:00/mi locked as current T pace (Adj #26). Run-only now: Hyp A relocated to Wed per §2.A revision. Run-MHR retest still owed (Adj #9).

Logged — Incline 140×5/5 RIR 2/1 (+ accidental 145×5 RIR 0 to failure) → +5 to 145 next Wed; tri pushdown 52.5 cleared (Adj #20→#28) bump 55; preacher 55 held, set 3 failure (Adj #21/#30 open); DB lat raise soft + 16-rep failure → bump 27.5 (Adj #29); soleus restored to 60s (Adj #14/#23→#31 satisfied); cable crunch 65 clean. No run.

Logged — 2.85 mi / 30:00 @ 10:30/mi, cadence 172, HR avg 160 (coolest read in the recent block). First relocated midweek run (Wed → Thu, §2.A revision) executed clean; pace honesty held at the Z1 floor (no creep). No carry-forward.

Logged — 3.26 mi / 30:21: 20 min easy @ 9:44/mi (HR 161) → 10 min @ 8:25/mi = M pace nailed (HR 176, cadence 177). HR avg 166, Z4/Z5-dominant, peak ~180; strong recovery 175→136 in 2 min. First Zoom Fly 6 run (0→3.26 mi) = carbon-plate break-in, fit clean. Bilateral Achilles soreness reported but present with both shoes → not shoe-specific, standing load signal (mileage ramp + soleus), monitor (Adj #33). No MHR data — Adj #9 still owed.

days.session: Long Z1 40 min (Vomero, flat) AM + Hyp B PM — Achilles-modified
days.note: Logged — Achilles plan executed (Adj #34): long run trimmed to 40 min flat Z1 @ 10:45/mi in the Vomero, nasal throughout, HR 162, NO Achilles pain on the run. Hyp B: lat 145 + 4 sets clean → bump 150 (Adj #35); but double-day fatigue ran row/cable/tri/preacher to failure — row 85 failed (regressed to 80 failure, Adj #36), cable lat capped 17.5 per user directive (Adj #37), tri 55 reps held all-failure (Adj #38), preacher 55 hold persists (Adj #39); calf held 325 (335 deferred, Adj #40); soleus skipped (Adj #42); hanging SLR → 12 (Adj #41). Reassess Sun AM via 24-h rule (Adj #43).

days.session: Off / SI prehab + Achilles AM recheck
days.note: Tyler twists 3×15, reverse Tyler 3×15, McGill Big 3 5-3-1. Walking fine. ACHILLES 24-h recheck (Adj #43): AM no-worse than Sat → dose held, continue load-managed; worse → step down (cross-train Z1, drop calf). §11.E escalate on sharp pain / swelling / sudden weakness.
